# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-PRV-062](task-0129): Provider Data Retention Rules

## Purpose

Implement provider data retention rules.

## Scope

- Retention rules
- Enforcement
- Exceptions

## Implementation

1. Define rules
2. Implement enforcement
3. Handle exceptions

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Rules defined
2. Enforcement works
3. Exceptions handled
